positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a glowing, stylized crescent moon nestled among stylized, geometric flora and fauna. Use clean lines, bold silhouettes, and strong contrasts in color. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo blue, sage green, warm mustard yellow, and off-white. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for apparel printing, with ample negative space. The style should mimic sophisticated linocut printing combined with modern Swiss graphic design elements. High resolution, vector art quality, flat design, elegant symmetry, forest core vibes.
negative: photorealistic, gradient, bokeh, watermark, text, logo, busy background, low contrast, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, blurry, noise, jpeg artifacts, graffiti, messy, cluttered
